amendment_authority: user_selection option C in workflow/tqe-p5-twse-source-contract.json decision.user_selection, decided 2026-07-22
goal: Admit the approved three-year TWSE EOD history (2023-07-20..2026-07-19) via a bounded per-trading-day capture against the official free MI_INDEX CSV endpoint, with the official calendar bound in the same work-unit and separate corporate-action evidence.

captured_calendar.coverage_limitation: The official holidaySchedule endpoint returns only the current ROC year (115 = 2026); 2023-07-20..2025-12-31 is not covered by this capture.

session_list_source.coverage_gap_handling: See workflow/tqe-p5-option-c-session-list.json coverage_gap_handling_options; per-year official calendar captures are extra GETs and require separate user approval before execution.
session_list_source.binding: The calendar response sha256 recorded here is bound to this work-unit; the full-window session enumeration and its own digest must replace the partial list before any session GET

bounded_capture_loop.session_enumeration: every trading session in the approved calendar-derived list is enumerated explicitly in the finalized work-unit before host egress; no date arithmetic at run time

request_budget.retry_policy: no automatic retry; a failed session is recorded and the run stops for human review

pacing.reason: TWSE publishes no numeric rate limit; practitioner reports describe throttling/ban on dense crawling

fail_closed_rules: stop before first GET if calendar sha256 is not recorded in this work-unit
stop if enumerated session count exceeds session_count_cap
stop if total issued GETs would exceed total_gets_max
stop on any non-200 response, empty body, or missing 證券代號 header row
stop if a session response date does not match the requested date
stop if csv encoding or column schema differs from the trial-capture probe record
no date outside 2023-07-20..2026-07-19 may be requested
no session may be fetched twice; duplicates are a hard error

per_session_record_format.response_sha256: sha256:<hex> of the uncompressed CSV bytes

approval_packet.purpose: single human approval point before host egress
user_approves_in_one_decision: full-window enumerated session list replacing workflow/tqe-p5-option-c-session-list.json partial list (requires resolving the 2023-2025 calendar coverage gap first)
the final sha256 digest of this work-unit after that replacement
not_yet_approvable: per_session_work_unit_digest: blocked until the full-window session enumeration exists; current digest is template-only
